summary: F-LOW DC6 verified already satisfied in the driver: parse_number_i64/u64 reject every exponent form before prefix integer parsing, so the Oracle max-negative NUMBER sentinel -1e126 fails closed instead of collapsing to -1. No driver change was needed; this artifact binds the exact commit verified.

verification: builders.rs:107-109 and 131-133 reject b'e'/b'E' before the prefix scan; all 5 parse_number_i64 call sites inherit the guard, so both integer-builder paths are covered by construction
cargo test -p oracledb --features arrow --lib number_sentinel -> 1 passed (decoder-produced [0x00] sentinel; Float64 keeps -1e126, Int64 fails closed, -1 and 12 still map, 1e3 refused)
